This medicine contains 13.71 mg sodium (main component of
the recommended maximum daily dietary intake of sodium for an adult.
for the shortest duration necessary to relieve symptoms.
Do not take more than 6 tablets in 24 hours.
Do not give to children under 12 years.
In children and adolescents between 12 and 18 years:
Do not take for longer than 10 days
